judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue expansion and positive free cash flow, but currently unprofitable and trading at a high valuation multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 7.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 33.5% YoY indicates strong market adoption and expansion.
Positive free cash flow of $755.00M TTM shows operational efficiency in generating cash.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target price suggesting upside potential.
Gross margin of 73.3% is healthy, indicating efficient cost management on services.
negatives: Operating margin of -9.7% and profit margin of -3.7% indicate the company is not yet profitable.
Forward P/E of 139.44x and Price/Sales of 32.28x suggest a very high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 230.86% is high, indicating significant leverage.
Return on equity of -5.9% and return on assets of -2.7% reflect current unprofitability.
